display_text: Metamorphic Mandible, Tier 4: Neutral item with an active ability to enter an insect form for 4 seconds, granting +35% magic resistance and +15% movement speed. While transformed, your hero size is decreased and your armor is reduced by 45%. This provides a burst of survivability against magic damage and mobility, at the cost of physical defense. Stats: CD: 30s, Duration: 4s, Magic Res Bonus: +35%, MS Bonus: +15%, Armor Reduction: -45%.
search_text: neutral item, tier 4 neutral, insect form, pupate, magic resistance, movement speed, size reduction, armor reduction, escape tool, magic defense, mobility, burst defense, physical vulnerability, Metamorphic Mandible, mandible
